since_last: 13% of 84 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.31%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 13% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -2.06% · Gold -1.31% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 13% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.31%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.31%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.84%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +8.64%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +8.64%, AVAV +6.80%, BIDU +5.27%, SPCX +1.45%, CHKP +1.31%. Laggards: MGNI -4.14%, NOW -3.53%, PUBM -3.39%, RXRX -3.37%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.45% at $151.64
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.45% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
